title: athyrium filix-femina var. michauxii
intro: Athyrium filix-femina var. michauxii, also known as the lady fern or Michaux's lady fern, is a variety of the lady fern plant, a type of fern native to North America. The medicinal properties of Athyrium filix-femina var. michauxii include its ability to reduce inflammation, and its use as a diuretic and astringent. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and soothe respiratory issues. Athyrium filix-femina var. michauxii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
